name: 3 Tier Clear Storage Cart - Brightroom™
description:
Organize toys, craft supplies or other items with the 3 Tier Clear Storage Cart from Brightroom™. This clear utility cart features a three-tier design with raised sides to help keep the contents neatly contained. Made of an acrylic-like frame, it provides a functional addition to your home, and comes with rolling wheels for easy movement.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
